stemHtml:
Per ICAO Doc 8168 (PANS-OPS), which of these SIDs qualify as straight departures?

1. SID RWY 26: initial track 4° left of runway alignment
2. SID RWY 14: initial track 20° right of runway alignment
3. SID RWY 08: initial track 10° right of runway alignment
4. SID RWY 05: initial track 16° left of runway alignment
